mapper.select:
SELECT SM.SPECIAL_ID , SM.SPECIAL_NM , SM.START_DATE , SM.END_DATE FROM special_mst SM WHERE 1=1
AND DATE_FORMAT(SM.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') <= #{startDate} AND DATE_FORMAT(SM.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') >= #{startDate} /* 마감일 지난 특가 제외 */
AND SM.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND SM.PROGRESS_TYPE = 'START' ORDER BY SM.SPECIAL_ID DESC

/* 특가 예약 전 남은수량 체크 리스트1 */ SELECT SD.SPECIAL_ID , SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , P.PRODUCT_NM , I.IMAGE_URL , P.ORG_PRICE AS ORG_PRICE -- 권장 소비자가 , P.ORG_SALES_PRICE AS ORG_SALES_PRICE -- 현장가 , SD.QTY AS START_STOCK -- 시작 stock , ( SD.QTY - IFNULL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN RD.SALES_CNT > 0 THEN RD.SALES_CNT ELSE RD.RESERVATION_CNT END ) FROM special_rsv_dtl RD JOIN special_rsv_mst RM ON RD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = RM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID WHERE RD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID AND RM.SPECIAL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_ID AND RD.CANCEL_YN = 'N' ), 0) ) AS REMAIN_STOCK -- 남은 재고수량 , ROUND( ( (PD.ORG_SALES_PRICE - SD.SALES_PRICE) / PD.ORG_SALES_PRICE ) * 100 , 0 ) AS DISCOUNT_RATE -- 할인율(%) , SD.SALES_PRICE AS SPECIAL_PRICE -- 특가 판매가 FROM special_dtl SD INNER JOIN product_mst P ON SD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID LEFT JOIN product_image_dtl I ON I.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID AND I.SORT_ORDER = ( SELECT MIN(PI.SORT_ORDER) FROM product_image_dtl PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID ) WHERE SD.SPECIAL_ID = #{specialId};
mapper.update: /** * 예약수량 수정 처리 (증감분만 반영) * 기존 예약수량(oldQty) 대비 증가/감소분만 REMAIN_QTY에 반영 */ UPDATE special_dtl SD SET SD.REMAIN_QTY = IFNULL(SD.REMAIN_QTY, SD.QTY) - IFNULL(#{addQty}, 0) WHERE SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = #{specialDtlId}
mapper.select: /* true : 요청 가능 (잔여수량 >= (신규요청 - 기존예약)) false : 불가능 (요청량이 초과됨) */ SELECT CASE WHEN (IFNULL(REMAIN_QTY, QTY) - IFNULL(#{addQty}, 0) ) >= 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_updatable FROM special_dtl WHERE SPECIAL_DTL_ID = #{specialDtlId}

/* 모바일 주문정보 조회 2025 10 29일 추가내역 */ SELECT SD.SPECIAL_ID , SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , SM.SPECIAL_NM , SM.START_DATE , SM.END_DATE , P.PRODUCT_NM , SLM.LOCATION_NM , SLM.ADDRESS , SD.LIMIT_QTY , CASE WHEN SD.IMAGE_URL IS NULL OR SD.IMAGE_URL = '' THEN I.IMAGE_URL ELSE SD.IMAGE_URL END AS IMAGE_URL , '9999-99-99' EXPIRATION_DATE , P.ORG_PRICE AS ORG_PRICE -- 권장 소비자가 , SD.QTY AS START_STOCK -- 시작 재고 , ( SD.QTY - IFNULL(( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN RD.SALES_CNT > 0 THEN RD.SALES_CNT ELSE RD.RESERVATION_CNT END ) FROM special_rsv_dtl RD JOIN special_rsv_mst RM ON RD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = RM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID WHERE RD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID AND RM.SPECIAL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_ID AND RD.CANCEL_YN = 'N' ), 0) ) AS REMAIN_STOCK -- 남은 재고수량 , ROUND( ( (P.ORG_PRICE - SD.SALES_PRICE) / P.ORG_PRICE ) * 100 , 0 ) AS DISCOUNT_RATE -- 할인율(%) , SD.SALES_PRICE AS SPECIAL_PRICE -- 특가 판매가 , IFNULL(RD_USER.RESERVATION_CNT, 0) AS MY_RESERVATION_QTY -- 내가 예약한 수량 , IFNULL(RD_USER.SALES_CNT, 0) AS MY_SALES_QTY -- 내가 구매 완료한 수량 , IFNULL(RD_USER.RESERVATION_PRICE,0) AS MY_RESERVATION_PRICE -- 내가 예약한 총 금액 , IFNULL(RD_USER.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID,0) AS MY_SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID -- 예약 마스터 ID , IFNULL(RD_USER.RESERVATION_STATUS,'') AS MY_RESERVATION_STATUS -- 예약 상태 , MAX(DATE_FORMAT(SM.PICKUP_END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i')) AS PICKUP_END_DATE FROM special_rsv_dtl RVD INNER JOIN special_rsv_mst RVM ON RVD.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = RVM.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID INNER JOIN special_dtl SD ON RVD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID INNER JOIN special_mst SM ON SD.SPECIAL_ID = SM.SPECIAL_ID INNER JOIN product_mst P ON SD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM store_mst WHERE STORE_ID = #{storeId}) ST ON SM.STORE_ID = ST.STORE_ID INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM store_location_mst WHERE LOCATION_ID = #{locationId}) SLM ON SLM.STORE_ID = ST.STORE_ID LEFT JOIN product_image_dtl I ON I.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID AND I.SORT_ORDER = ( SELECT MIN(PI.SORT_ORDER) FROM product_image_dtl PI WHERE PI.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RVD2.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , RVM2.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID , RVM2.RESERVATION_STATUS , SUM(RVD2.RESERVATION_CNT) AS RESERVATION_CNT , SUM(RVD2.SALES_CNT) AS SALES_CNT , SUM(RVD2.RESERVATION_PRICE) AS RESERVATION_PRICE FROM special_rsv_dtl RVD2 INNER JOIN special_rsv_mst RVM2 ON RVD2.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID = RVM2.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID WHERE RVM2.USER_ID = #{userId} -- ✅ 현재 로그인한 사용자 AND RVD2.CANCEL_YN = 'N' AND ( RVM2.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION' -- 예약 중 OR (RVM2.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' -- 오늘 픽업 완료 AND DATE(RVM2.VISIT_DATE) = CURDATE()) ) GROUP BY RVD2.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , RVM2.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID, RVM2.RESERVATION_STATUS ) RD_USER ON RD_USER.SPECIAL_DTL_ID = SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID WHERE RVM.USER_ID = #{userId} -- ✅ 현재 로그인한 사용자 AND RVD.CANCEL_YN = 'N' AND ( RVM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION' OR (RVM.RESERVATION_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' AND DATE(RVM.VISIT_DATE) = CURDATE()) ) GROUP BY SD.SPECIAL_ID , SD.SPECIAL_DTL_ID , P.PRODUCT_ID , SM.SPECIAL_NM , SM.START_DATE , SM.END_DATE , P.PRODUCT_NM , SLM.LOCATION_NM , SLM.ADDRESS , SD.LIMIT_QTY , IMAGE_URL , P.ORG_PRICE , SD.QTY , SD.SALES_PRICE , RD_USER.RESERVATION_CNT , RD_USER.SALES_CNT , RD_USER.RESERVATION_PRICE , RD_USER.SPECIAL_RSV_MST_ID , RD_USER.RESERVATION_STATUS ORDER BY CASE WHEN MY_RESERVATION_STATUS = 'RESERVATION' THEN 1 WHEN MY_RESERVATION_STATUS = 'COMPLETE' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END ,SM.PICKUP_END_DATE , SD.SPECIAL_ID DESC ;
